# How Biscuit

How Biscuit publishes plain-language explainers across broad topics.

Primary sections:

- Home: https://howbiscuit.com/
- Sitemap: https://howbiscuit.com/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed: https://howbiscuit.com/feed.xml

This site is intended for public indexing unless a future experiment explicitly records a different crawl policy.
